name: @typefm/comrak-wasm
description: WebAssembly bindings for comrak — a fast CommonMark + GFM Markdown parser and renderer

scripts.build: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-name comrak --out-dir pkg ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/comrak_wasm.wasm && mv pkg/comrak_bg.wasm pkg/comrak.wasm && mv pkg/comrak_bg.wasm.d.ts pkg/comrak.wasm.d.ts && sed -i '' 's/comrak_bg\.wasm/comrak.wasm/g' pkg/comrak.js pkg/comrak.d.ts pkg/comrak.wasm.d.ts
scripts.shiki: cd examples/shiki && npm install && npm start
